THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAYES, KAREN ANN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CORLEY, MARY PLAINTIFF'S POWER OF ATTY FOR FINANCES TERMINATED BY THE DEATH OF THE PRINCIPAL MARK REDWOOD & IS NO LONGER IN EFFECT PER PROBATE CODE SECTION 4152 (A)(4). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CORLEY, MARY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT HAYES, KAREN ANN CROSS COMPLAINANT IS NOT AN HEIR TO DECEDENT MARK REDWOOD AT LAW & THEREFORE LACKS STANDING TO COLLECT ASSETS OF DECEDENT'S ESTATE INCLUDING HIS PERSONAL PROPERTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
